label: fabricated
reason: This document purports to authorize explicit age-based applicant screening, which fundamentally contradicts the ADEA's protections, and no such EEOC Technical Guidance, safe harbor provision, or Form EEOC-TG-2503 exists.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: This document purports to allow explicit age-based screening of job applicants, which directly contradicts the core protections of the ADEA; the EEOC has no authority to create a "safe harbor" for age-cohort filtering, no such Technical Guidance 2025-03 or Form EEOC-TG-2503 exists, and the language and concepts (e.g., "cohort-anchored technology-adoption fluency") are invented and inconsistent with genuine EEOC guidance.
